system.description: You grow vampiric fangs and can only sustain yourself from the blood of other sapient beings. Instead of food, you must drink blood (cause 1d6 + STR modifier damage) from one person per day to sustain yourself. The blood can come from a willing donor, or from hapless victims. A resisting victim requires a successful Grapple, per the Combat chapter. You do not need any other sustenance.
